libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Ensure generated native tests keep/apply the Netty Java 25 runtime system properties for 5.0.1 as well as 5.0.0: `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true`. Meaningful tests can start a local Vert.x `HttpServer` on `127.0.0.1` and exercise `WebClient`, forms/multipart, redirects, cookies/session, caching, and body codecs without external services.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: If the generated build keeps the existing version guard only for `5.0.0`, native-image run for `5.0.1` may fail before the web-client behavior is meaningfully validated.
Optional OAuth2/databind paths have optional or test-scope dependencies upstream; avoid selecting those as core coverage unless the corresponding dependency is intentionally added.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 still resolves Vert.x Core 5.0.1 with Netty 4.2.2.Final, so the existing Java 25 native-image Netty unsafe-access runtime setup remains relevant for meaningful native coverage; no extra test dependency or Docker service is needed because the client can be exercised against an in-process Vert.x HTTP server.
